description:
Currently project detail is local state (selectedSlug) inside ProjectsView — no real route exists. Refreshing the page or sharing a link loses the open project.

**What to do:**
- Create a TanStack Router dynamic route at `/projects/$slug` (apps/ui/src/routes/projects.$slug.tsx)
- Migrate `ProjectDetail` to render on this route, receiving `slug` from route params
- Update `ProjectsList` to navigate to `/projects/$slug` on row/card click instead of setting local state
- Keep `/projects` as the list view

**Files to touch:**
- `apps/ui/src/routes/projects.tsx`
- New: `apps/ui/src/routes/projects.$slug.tsx`
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/projects-view/projects-list.tsx`
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/projects-view/projects-view.tsx`
title: Project page: add URL routing for project detail (/projects/$slug)
